incorrects.description: Student selected 4: counted marks instead of reading the scale value

steps.text: You counted the marks. Look at the NUMBER where the bar ends. What number is at the top of Fiction?

incorrects.description: Student selected 35: estimated between 30 and 40 when bar ends at axis line

params.description: Horizontal guideline draws from Fiction bar to axis.

steps.text: The bar ends right at a line. Follow it to the axis. Which number is right there?

incorrects.description: Student selected 45: overshot the actual bar height

params.description: Horizontal guideline draws from Fiction bar to axis at 40.

steps.text: Follow the top of the bar straight across to the axis. Where does it meet the numbers?

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Horizontal line draws from top of Fiction bar to axis at 40, which highlights.

steps.text: Let me show you. I look at where the Fiction bar ends. I follow that line across to the axis numbers. It meets the axis right at 40. The Fiction bar shows 40.
